docs.title: tw-utils Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation of tw-utils — tools and helpers for the browser game Tribal Wars.

docs.title: Tools
docs.text:
• Off-Planner — Plan offensive attacks
  • AG-Planner — Coordinate AG spam
  • ZWC-Planner — Calculate synchronized waves
  • Discord Bot — Tribe integration in Discord

docs.title: About tw-utils
docs.text: tw-utils is a hobby project. The source code is available on GitHub.
